title: heuchera cylindrica var. ovalifolia
intro: Heuchera cylindrica var. ovalifolia, also known as Coralbells or Maple Leaf Coralbells, is a type of flowering plant in the Saxifragaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in healing wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Heuchera cylindrica var. ovalifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the roots or leaves, although specific preparation methods may vary depending on the intended use.
